headlines.title: Historic win for SNP but change and challenges ahead at Holyrood
headlines.description: John Swinney will return as first minister after a fifth Scottish election victory for the SNP.

headlines.title: Analysis: Many Labour MPs are blaming the boss for elections body blow
headlines.description: Sir Keir Starmer is facing what looks like a coordinated attempt to get him to set a timetable for his departure.

headlines.title: Reform election gains show shift in British politics, says Farage
headlines.description: Labour and the Conservatives suffer losses at the expense of Reform across England.

headlines.title: No leadership pressure on Badenoch despite Tory losses
headlines.description: The Tories had a grim night at the polls, losing seats to both Reform and the Liberal Democrats.

headlines.title: Polanski says two-party politics 'dead' after election gains for Greens
headlines.description: The Greens secured their first-ever elected mayors and took control of councils, including Norwich.

headlines.title: Anger and resignation in Tenerife as hantavirus ship approaches
headlines.description: Some on the Spanish island worry the imminent arrival of the MV Hondius could pose a health risk.

headlines.title: William hails Sir David Attenborough's 'remarkable milestone' at 100th birthday concert
headlines.description: The naturalist's seven-decade career was marked with a special concert at the Royal Albert Hall.

headlines.title: More than 200,000 migrants have crossed Channel in small boats since 2018
headlines.description: More than 6,000 people crossed the Channel so far this year, 36% below the total for the same time last year

headlines.title: Putin denounces Nato at scaled back Victory Day parade
headlines.description: The Russian leader used his annual speech to justify his so-called special military operation in Ukraine.

headlines.title: 'Illegal' traveller plot was listed for sale on Facebook
headlines.description: The four-acre site has been at the heart of an ongoing row with locals since Friday.

headlines.title: The UK is set for a staycation summer - and there are plenty of hidden gems
headlines.description: Seasoned staycationers share their favourite spots as Airbnb and Booking.com say interest in UK stays are up on last year.

headlines.title: Anti-work anthems, Boy George and controversial lyrics: A guide to all 35 Eurovision songs
headlines.description: From dancefloor bangers to heartfelt ballads, here are the highlights and low points of Eurovision.

headlines.title: Move over matcha. Hojicha is coming to a cafe near you
headlines.description: From lattes to ice-cream, the Japanese tea is popping up more and more on menus across the UK.

headlines.title: Car crashes into 'multiple pedestrians' in Nottinghamshire
headlines.description: One person suffers life-threatening injuries as police work to trace the driver.

headlines.title: Hungary's new PM to be sworn in during 'regime change' party
headlines.description: Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Labour's historic battering' and 'Vernon and Tess split'
headlines.description: Saturday's papers lead with calls for the PM to quit after Labour's local election losses and Tess Daly and Vernon Kay's marriage split.

headlines.title: The UFO community has been waiting for answers. Has the Pentagon delivered?
headlines.description: Those within the UFO community spent their day scrutinizing the new documents, images and videos released by the Pentagon.

headlines.title: Margaret Thatcher assassination story by Hilary Mantel gets stage premiere in Liverpool
headlines.description: In The Assassination of Margaret Thatcher, the award-winning author imagined a plot to kill the PM.

headlines.title: The car garage that became an unusual fashion house... for Kim Kardashian
headlines.description: A Kent bodyshop painted the striking orange breastplate she wore to the Met Gala after previously fixing its designers' car.

headlines.title: Farmer's shock as sheep gives birth to seven lambs - one shy of world record
headlines.description: While twins and triplets are common, seven lambs being born to one ewe is said to be "incredibly rare".

headlines.title: Boy, 8, showered with gifts after calming plane passenger with singing and football cards
headlines.description: Phoenix has been sent gifts from as far away as Germany after his actions prevented the flight being diverted.

headlines.title: 'Bumpy' the orphaned baby hippo to be hand-reared at Kenyan sanctuary
headlines.description: The calf was just days old when it was found desperately nudging its dead mother at a lake last weekend.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Electioncast: The winners and the losers
headlines.description: Labour suffers historic losses across UK elections.

headlines.title: Trump takes his revenge on disloyal Republicans
headlines.description: The US president targets his political enemies in Kentucky and Indiana

headlines.title: Fast-paced, witty and smart coming-of-age comedy
headlines.description: Two booksmart girls try to cram in four years of fun on the eve of their graduation.

headlines.title: An insight into the secretive 'matchstick men' painter
headlines.description: The secretive artist revealed as never before, with his voice lip-synced by Ian McKellen.

headlines.title: Fernandes: The trophies, the assist record and his future
headlines.description: No Premier League medal, no Champions League title, but Bruno Fernandes has won other trophies and many accolades, and the FWA footballer of the year is on the brink of setting a record.

headlines.title: Arteta rallies Arsenal for huge Premier League weekend
headlines.description: As the Premier League title race nears its conclusion, Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta tells his players and the Gunners fans to "stay present and live the moment".

headlines.title: From cricket to 'bosh' queen - England prop Muir
headlines.description: England prop Maud Muir discusses her childhood cricket days and love for pottery and "boshing" defenders.

headlines.title: Saints charged by EFL with spying on Middlesbrough
headlines.description: The EFL charges Southampton with spying on Middlesbrough before they meet in the Championship play-off semi-finals on Saturday.

headlines.title: 'Good business' for PGA Tour if LIV players return - McIlroy
headlines.description: Rory McIlroy says bringing back LIV Golf defectors would be "good business" for the PGA Tour amid doubts over the future of the breakaway series.

headlines.title: Djokovic stunned on return to action in Rome
headlines.description: An out-of-sorts Novak Djokovic suffers defeat on his return to action as he is stunned by gutsy qualifier Dino Prizmic in the Italian Open second round.

headlines.title: Tight-lipped Dubois weighs in at career-heavy 18st
headlines.description: Daniel Dubois will not to be drawn into a war of words after weighing in at a career-heavy 18st for Saturday's all-British heavyweight world-title fight against Fabio Wardley.
